document.docAuthor: Peng, Feng, Xie, Xiufeng, Peng, Zhengqiang, Wang, Xingmin & Chen, Xiaoshen
document.masterDocTitle: A taxonomic review of the genus Axinoscymnus Kamiya, with descriptions of three new species (Coleoptera, Coccinellidae)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A taxonomic review of the genus Axinoscymnus Kamiya, with descriptions of three new species (Coleoptera, Coccinellidae)

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Key Laboratory of Bio-Pesticide Innovation and Application, Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510642, China. & Engineering Research Center of Biocontrol, Ministry of Education and Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510640, China.

Environment and Plant Protection Institute, Chinese Academy of Tropical Agricultural Science, Haikou 571101, China. lypzhq @ 163. com; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0003 - 2955 - 5475

Key Laboratory of Bio-Pesticide Innovation and Application, Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510642, China. & Engineering Research Center of Biocontrol, Ministry of Education and Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510640, China.

Key Laboratory of Bio-Pesticide Innovation and Application, Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510642, China. & Engineering Research Center of Biocontrol, Ministry of Education and Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510640, China.

bibRefCitation.author: Hoang, D. N.
bibRefCitation.refString: Hoang, D. N. (1979) Three new species of Scymninae (Coccinellidae) from Vietnam. Tap chi Sinh Vat Hoc, 1, 11 - 15

subSubSection.paragraph:
Diagnosis. This species is similar to
A. fumatus (Sicard)
and
A. singaporicus Pang et Gordon
in the stout penis but can be separated from them by the black elytra and the penis with pointed apex and apical 1/2 to proximal swollen with membranous appendage ( Fig. 11a, 11h ). In
A. fumatus
, the elytra are dark brown and the penis with a blunt tip. In
A. singaporicus
, the elytra are also dark brown with yellowish brown basal margin and a blunt tip of penis.

caption.paragraph:
FIGURE 11.
Axinoscymnus macrosiphonatus Hoàng, 1979
: a, d dorsal view b, e lateral view c, f frontal view g abdomen h penis i tegmen, lateral view j tegmen, inner view. Scale bars: a–f: 0.5 mm, g: 0.2 mm, h–j: 0.05 mm.

Distribution. China ( Yunnan , Xizang , Guangxi , Hainan , Guangdong ); Laos ; Vietnam .
Remarks. This species is recorded from China and Laos for the first time.
